meta.title: Pricing — ClassAuto
meta.description: Throughout the 2026 beta, university faculty get the full Pro feature set for free. No advertising, auto-deletion after graduation.

hero.title: Pro is free for academia during the beta
hero.subtitle: Pricing after general availability will be decided once we've gathered user feedback at the end of the beta. For now we only publish limits and features.

limitsTable.title: Student-side usage limits
limitsTable.subtitle: Student interaction guardrails apply to every plan (Guardrail system §5).

limitsModal.title: {plan} — full limits
limitsModal.footer: Part of the §3 frequency layer of the 4-stage cost guardrail system.

enterprise.title: Institutional license
enterprise.subtitle: Unlimited learners, negotiated render quota, multi-tenant + SSO. Department- or college-wide deployment.
items: Campus attendance roll-up + volume discount per faculty seat

items.q: Any benefit for the beta period?
items.a: Throughout the 2026 beta, university faculty get the full Pro feature set for free. Pricing after general availability will be decided once we've gathered user feedback at the end of the beta; beta participants will receive separate benefits.

items.q: Do unused renders carry over to next month?
items.a: No, they don't. The 8-render Basic cap is tuned for the 3–4 courses a typical Korean professor teaches in a month.
Yes — by monthly active learner (anyone who watched a video in the month). Free 30, Basic 80, Pro 150. Larger classes need an institutional license.

items.q: Can students use the Q&A chatbot for off-topic questions?
items.a: No. ClassAuto's Q&A is RAG-bound to the lecture material; out-of-scope questions are refused (similarity threshold 0.7). See the security page for the policy.

items.q: What if a student leaves the video playing unattended?
items.a: Interstitial quizzes appear every 5–15 minutes. Failing to respond within 30 seconds auto-pauses the video; three accumulated misses voids that watch session. Concurrent playback is capped at 1 per student.

items.q: Will I be billed during the beta?
items.a: No. Stripe payment flow is disabled during the beta. Once your beta application is approved (school email + affiliation check), the full Pro feature set is enabled automatically.

betaCallout.title: 2026 Beta — Pro free for academia
betaCallout.body: Throughout the beta, university faculty can use the full Pro tier free of charge. Pricing after general availability will be decided once we've gathered user feedback at the end of the beta.

footerCta.title: Join the beta now
footerCta.body: Apply with your university email and the full Pro feature set unlocks for free. With a single PPT deck, your first lecture ships in about 12 minutes.
